nodes.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
nodes.summary: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Pelzeln's tody-tyrant、Black-capped pygmy tyrant、Straneck's tyrannulet等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 白胸鳾
nodes.summary: 白胸鳾（White-breasted nuthatch，学名 Sitta carolinensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于康乃爾鳥類學實驗室。

links.key: bird-白胸鳾-424fb920__distributed_in__loc-康乃爾鳥類學實驗室-dbbe1ad4
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the west and Mexico, the white-breasted nuthatch is found in open montane pine-oak woodlands, and nesting occurs at up to elevation in Nevada, California and Mexico. Pinyon-juniper and riverside woodlands may be used locally where available. The white-breasted nuthatch is the only North American nuthatch usually found in deciduous trees; red-breasted, pygmy and brown-headed nuthatches prefer pines or other conifers. The presence of mature or decaying trees with holes suitable for nesting is essential, and trees such as oak, beech and hickory are favored in the east since they also provide edible seeds. White-breasted nuthatches seldom excavate their own nest holes like red-breasted nuthatches. Although suitable habitat is distributed continentally, it is discontinuous
